# SweetAlert2 vendor bundle

- Version: 11.26.25
- Source: https://github.com/sweetalert2/sweetalert2
- Distribution: sweetalert2.all.min.js and sweetalert2.min.css
- License: MIT (see LICENSE)
- Integration: loaded locally by public/index.html; Wikist theme overrides live in public/assets/styles.css.
